title: heliconiaceae
intro: The Heliconiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are closely related and share similar characteristics, such as the heliconia flowers, which are known for their brightly colored, waxy bracts. The Heliconiaceae family includes over 100 species of plants, primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. These plants are often grown for their vibrant flowers and are popular in horticulture and floral arrangements.
